evals.prompt: 5xx spike on ai-backend, started 10 mins ago
evals.expected_output: A conversational investigation that: (1) frames the problem clearly, (2) launches parallel subagents for error logs + APM traces + recent deployments, (3) narrates findings with hypotheses, (4) verifies causal chains in code before claiming them, (5) distinguishes co-occurring from cascading errors, (6) produces an evidence-backed RCA report with deep links

assertions.text: Frames problem before querying (states service, symptom, time window, initial hypotheses)
Forms and states a hypothesis before all data is in
Narrates reasoning — connects findings to hypotheses, not just data dumps
Verifies causal chains in code — reads actual source files to confirm or deny error relationships
Distinguishes co-occurring errors from causal chains with code evidence
Produces a structured RCA with evidence chain, timeline, and action items
Includes Datadog or CloudWatch deep links

evals.prompt: memory-service tasks keep getting killed, ECS showing OOM
evals.expected_output: A conversational investigation that: (1) recognizes this as an infrastructure/OOM pattern, (2) checks ECS task events and CloudWatch memory metrics, (3) challenges the user's premise if evidence contradicts it, (4) verifies findings in code, (5) produces RCA with container-level evidence

assertions.text: Challenges the user's premise if evidence contradicts it
Checks ECS stopped tasks and examines stop reasons
Verifies findings in code — reads source files to confirm or deny memory leak vectors
Produces a structured RCA with evidence chain and action items

evals.expected_output: Agent checks Slack alerts channel or Datadog monitors for the most recent alert, extracts alert details, adapts investigation to whatever it finds, verifies causal chains in code, and produces a structured RCA.

assertions.text: Fetches latest alert from Slack or Datadog monitors
Adapts investigation approach to the specific alert found
Verifies causal chains in code — distinguishes cascading from co-occurring errors
Produces a structured RCA with evidence chain and action items
Includes a timeline of events with timestamps
